allow_instructions: In this Custody Note workspace and sister repos (custody-note-website, Policestationrepuk, policestationagent, pstrain-rebuild, custodynote-anywhere), always allow shell, git, gh, npm, node, tests, builds, deploys, MCP, fetch, and file edits without asking.
git and gh are fully allowed for agent commit/push/PR/release workflows when the user requests them or has authorised ongoing shipping work.
Repositories under robertcashman-bit and sibling project folders are in scope for commit, push, deploy, and website sync.
block_instructions: Block git push --force to main/master unless the user explicitly asked for that exact command in the same message.
